use_cases: Add a retro-styled cursor trail effect to landing pages and portfolio sites
Create interactive visual feedback for creative tool applications
Enhance brand identity with custom cursor effects on marketing pages
Implement dithering-based cursor tracking for digital art projects
Add subtle animated polish to interactive product demos
ai_summary: A canvas-based cursor trail component that renders a dynamic dithering effect using a Bayer matrix. As users move their cursor, it paints small pixel squares that fade out over time, creating a fluid monochrome tail. Fully responsive with resize handling and smooth requestAnimationFrame-based animation.
